segments.text: The Lord is my light and my salvation;
Whom shall I fear? The Lord is the strength of my life; Of whom shall I be afraid?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: When the wicked came against me To eat up my flesh, My enemies and foes,
Though an army may encamp against me, My heart shall not fear; Though war may rise against me, In this I will be confident.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: One thing I have desired of the Lord, That will I seek: That I may dwell in the house of the Lord All the days of my life, To behold the beauty of the Lord, And to inquire in His temple.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For in the time of trouble He shall hide me in His pavilion; In the secret place of His tabernacle He shall hide me; He shall set me high upon a rock.
And now my head shall be lifted up above my enemies all around me; Therefore I will offer sacrifices of joy in His tabernacle; I will sing, yes, I will sing praises to the Lord.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hear, O Lord, when I cry with my voice! Have mercy also upon me, and answer me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My heart said to You, 'Your face, Lord, I will seek.'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not hide Your face from me; Do not turn Your servant away in anger; You have been my help; Do not leave me nor forsake me, O God of my salvation.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: When my father and my mother forsake me, Then the Lord will take care of me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Teach me Your way, O Lord, And lead me in a smooth path, because of my enemies.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not deliver me to the will of my adversaries; For false witnesses have risen against me, And such as breathe out violence.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I would have lost heart, unless I had believed That I would see the goodness of the Lord In the land of the living.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Wait on the Lord; Be of good courage, And He shall strengthen your heart; Wait, I say, on the Lord!
segments.speaker: David
